issues.detail: The instructions lack error handling and edge case coverage.
The skill is tailored to Next.js/React and does not support other platforms.
No realistic usage examples are provided.

scenarios.name: Boot Intercom Messenger in Next.js with authenticated user
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly uses Intercom('boot') with app_id and user identification fields (user_id, email, name, created_at) from the documented snippet; baseline boots without created_at and misses the SPA update('last_request_at') pattern.

scenarios.name: Server-side create contact and send in-app message via Intercom REST API
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented POST https://api.intercom.io/contacts with role/external_id/custom_attributes and POST /messages with message_type 'inapp' and from.type 'admin'; baseline guesses endpoint shapes and omits the inapp message_type.
